market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Hideaway on Monk St – Free WiFi, Quiet
Cozy 4‑Guest Home, Prime Location, No Parking
Spacious Monk Street Escape – Ideal for Families
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to your private hideaway on Monk Street, a fully self‑contained home that comfortably sleeps up to four guests. Every night you’ll enjoy fast, reliable Wi‑Fi and a peaceful setting perfect for couples, small families, or business travellers seeking a quiet retreat. Rated 4.58 by 401 happy guests, our space combines modern comforts with a homely feel. The entire property is yours to use – no shared areas – giving you the freedom to relax, work, or cook at your own pace. With a nightly rate of £185, you get excellent value compared with the city’s median of £175. Although the next 90‑day calendar shows 76 open nights (only 15.2% booked), there’s huge potential to fill those dates and boost your earnings. The home’s layout includes a bright living area, a fully equipped kitchen, a comfortable bedroom suite, and a modern bathroom, all designed for convenience. While we currently list no specific amenities, you’ll find everything you need for a pleasant stay, and we’re eager to add high‑impact features such as outdoor seating, dedicated parking, and entertainment options. Book your stay at the Hideaway at Monk Street and experience a blend of comfort, convenience, and calm in the heart of the city.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, well‑staged living‑room shot as the cover photo – it instantly shows the space’s size and comfort and entices guests to scroll further.
key_diagnosis: Rate vs occupancy: your nightly price of £185 is only +6% above the cohort median (£175) yet you’re only 15.2% booked for the next 90 days versus the market median 28.3% – a clear mismatch.
Title is generic and at 49 characters it barely highlights your unique selling point; a sharper, keyword‑rich title will improve search clicks.
No amenities are listed – adding high‑value items like outdoor seating, parking, and entertainment can lift both rating perception and booking conversion.
analysis.outreach_hook: With 76 open nights in the next 90 days at £185 per night, you’re leaving up to £14,060 on the table.
